channel.title: Posts on Tayden Whites Website
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Tayden Whites Website

item.title: Static Sites
item.description: I was not aware of the wonders of static sites until I my first day at Johnson & Johnson, there I was made aware of the features of these hugo sites that make them so appealing.

item.title: Eisenhower
item.description: One tool I recently learned about is the Eisenhower Matrix. The Eisenhower Matrix is a method of applying weights to tasks based on two metrics, their urgency and their importance.

item.title: Hello World!
item.description: This is the first of a collection of posts I will make on this website. For this summer, they will mostly consist of personal takeaways from my time as an intern at Johnson & Johnson. I expect to learn a host of strategies and methods which I could not find in the classroom.
